strings.common.name: Name
strings.location.servicesDisabledPrompt: Location services are disabled. Would you like to enable them?
strings.location.backgroundDialog: The app requires "Always Allow location permissions." to run in the background. Would you like to open app settings to enable location permissions?
strings.location.foregroundDialog: The app requires location permissions to access your location. Would you like to open app settings to enable location permissions?
strings.location.backgroundNotificationText: The app will continue to receive your location even when you aren't using it
strings.redirect.noticeBody: You will be redirected to the default browser for login.
strings.pdf.noData: No PDF data available to download

permissions.notifications: פיננקידס שולחת התראות כשילדכם מסיים משימה, מרוויח פרס או מבקש את אישורכם. תוכלו בכל עת לנהל ולבחור אילו התראות לקבל.
permissions.geolocation: The app needs this permission to demonstrate the in-app feature for you.
permissions.geolocation_background: Always Allow location permissions are needed to continue tracking location in the background.
permissions.contacts: The app needs this permission to access your contacts and provide you with a better experience.
permissions.camera: The app needs this permission to take photos or record videos and then upload them through the attachment field.
permissions.microphone: The app needs this permission to record videos with a sound and then upload them through the attachment field.
permissions.photo_library_add: The app needs this permission to save images in photo library
permissions.calendar: The app needs this permission to access your calendar.
permissions.tracking: This app uses tracking to deliver personalized ads that enhance your experience.
permissions.nfc: Allow NFC access to enable scanning tags with this app.
permissions.health_read: Allow health data read access so we can display your activity data in the app.
permissions.health_write: Allow health data write access so we can save your activity from this app.
permissions.face_id: Granting access will allow you to use a Face ID to verify your identity and quick authorization.
permissions.speech_recognition: To provide you with voice-controlled features, we request access to your speech recognition; your voice data remains private and is only used to enhance your experience within our app.
